title: veronica austriaca subsp. macrodonta
intro: Veronica austriaca subsp. macrodonta, also known as the Austrian speedwell, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the plantain family (Plantaginaceae). This herb is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Veronica austriaca subsp. macrodonta include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
